note: Added MaterialImpact, FixDirection, Uncertainty, and State fields to contractReviewFindingLine and populated them in writeContractReviewFindingsJSONL from the source contractReviewFinding.
Same fix as f_001: the durable JSONL artifact now carries material_impact, fix_direction, uncertainty, and state via the updated contractReviewFindingLine struct and writeContractReviewFindingsJSONL.

Added a state assertion to TestContractReviewFindingsJSONLWrittenAtLoopEnd (non-blocking path), and added new TestContractReviewFindingsJSONLNewFieldsPersisted that runs with blocking findings (EMIT_BLOCKING=1, max_rounds=1) and asserts both state and material_impact are persisted in findings.jsonl.

Extended TestContractReviewerPromptContainsContractSchema with six rule-text assertions: HARD RULE / blocking=true ONLY, wording/advisory, material_impact required, advisory-when-no-impact, recall-first framing, and state=candidate framing. All lenses are checked.
